productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girl Printed Purple Top
description: Composition Purple and white top made of 100% cotton, has a straight neck, two thin adjustable straps with two buttons and a pink bow on the left shoulder, stitch detailing and a ruched effect on the chest and hem and a slightly elasticated back Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style with this stylish top from doodle. The straps with buttons and bow adds an element of cuteness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with shorts or a skirt and sandals to complete her look.
